description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is predominantly light-colored, with large windows and glass doors that allow for ample natural light. The house is surrounded by a landscaped yard featuring a mix of deciduous and coniferous trees, as well as manicured shrubs and grass patches. The structure includes a visible garage section, a spacious patio or deck area, and multiple entry points. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with some large picture windows and others in smaller groupings. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, with an emphasis on open space and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped surroundings. The design is minimalist, featuring a garage, patio, and a mix of trees and shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, garage, and a row of trees curving along the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, a cluster of trees at the back, and the patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio/deck, large windows, and a line of coniferous trees to the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the garage, driveway, and a group of trees in the foreground.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door with glass panels, minimal steps, and a small overhang; no porch or columns.
